2391 return nullptr;
2392 }
2393 temp_expression = temp_expression.drop_front(); // skip . or >
2394
2395 size_t next_sep_pos = temp_expression.find_first_of("-.[", 1);
2396 if (next_sep_pos == llvm::StringRef::npos) {
2397 // if no other separator just expand this last layer
2398 llvm::StringRef child_name = temp_expression;
2399 ValueObjectSP child_valobj_sp =
2400 root->GetChildMemberWithName(child_name);
2401 if (!child_valobj_sp) {
2402 if (ValueObjectSP altroot = GetAlternateValue(
2403 *root, options.m_synthetic_children_traversal))
2404 child_valobj_sp = altroot->GetChildMemberWithName(child_name);
2405 }
2406 if (child_valobj_sp) {
2407 *reason_to_stop =
2408 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonEndOfString;
2409 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypePlain;
2410 return child_valobj_sp;
2411 }
2412 *reason_to_stop = ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonNoSuchChild;
2413 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2414 return nullptr;
2415 }
2416
2417 llvm::StringRef next_separator = temp_expression.substr(next_sep_pos);
2418 llvm::StringRef child_name = temp_expression.slice(0, next_sep_pos);
2419
2420 ValueObjectSP child_valobj_sp = root->GetChildMemberWithName(child_name);
2421 if (!child_valobj_sp) {
2422 if (ValueObjectSP altroot = GetAlternateValue(
2423 *root, options.m_synthetic_children_traversal))
2424 child_valobj_sp = altroot->GetChildMemberWithName(child_name);
2425 }
2426 if (child_valobj_sp) {
2427 root = child_valobj_sp;
2428 remainder = next_separator;
2429 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypePlain;
2430 continue;
2431 }
2432 *reason_to_stop = ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonNoSuchChild;
2433 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2434 return nullptr;
2435 }
2436 case '[': {
2437 if (!root_compiler_type_info.Test(eTypeIsArray) &&
2438 !root_compiler_type_info.Test(eTypeIsPointer) &&
2439 !root_compiler_type_info.Test(
2440 eTypeIsVector)) // if this is not a T[] nor a T*
2441 {
2442 if (!root_compiler_type_info.Test(
2443 eTypeIsScalar)) // if this is not even a scalar...
2444 {
2445 if (options.m_synthetic_children_traversal ==
2446 GetValueForExpressionPathOptions::SyntheticChildrenTraversal::
2447 None) // ...only chance left is synthetic
2448 {
2449 *reason_to_stop =
2450 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonRangeOperatorInvalid;
2451 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2452 return ValueObjectSP();
2453 }
2454 } else if (!options.m_allow_bitfields_syntax) // if this is a scalar,
2455 // check that we can
2456 // expand bitfields
2457 {
2458 *reason_to_stop =
2459 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonRangeOperatorNotAllowed;
2460 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2461 return ValueObjectSP();
2462 }
2463 }
2464 if (temp_expression[1] ==
2465 ']') // if this is an unbounded range it only works for arrays
2466 {
2467 if (!root_compiler_type_info.Test(eTypeIsArray)) {
2468 *reason_to_stop =
2469 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonEmptyRangeNotAllowed;
2470 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2471 return nullptr;
2472 } else // even if something follows, we cannot expand unbounded ranges,
2473 // just let the caller do it
2474 {
2475 *reason_to_stop =
2476 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonArrayRangeOperatorMet;
2477 *final_result =
2478 ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeUnboundedRange;
2479 return root;
2480 }
2481 }
2482
2483 size_t close_bracket_position = temp_expression.find(']', 1);
2484 if (close_bracket_position ==
2485 llvm::StringRef::npos) // if there is no ], this is a syntax error
2486 {
2487 *reason_to_stop =
2488 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonUnexpectedSymbol;
2489 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2490 return nullptr;
2491 }
2492
2493 llvm::StringRef bracket_expr =
2494 temp_expression.slice(1, close_bracket_position);
2495
2496 // If this was an empty expression it would have been caught by the if
2497 // above.
2498 assert(!bracket_expr.empty());
2499
2500 if (!bracket_expr.contains('-')) {
2501 // if no separator, this is of the form [N]. Note that this cannot be
2502 // an unbounded range of the form [], because that case was handled
2503 // above with an unconditional return.
2504 unsigned long index = 0;
2505 if (bracket_expr.getAsInteger(0, index)) {
2506 *reason_to_stop =
2507 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonUnexpectedSymbol;
2508 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2509 return nullptr;
2510 }
2511
2512 // from here on we do have a valid index
2513 if (root_compiler_type_info.Test(eTypeIsArray)) {
2514 ValueObjectSP child_valobj_sp = root->GetChildAtIndex(index);
2515 if (!child_valobj_sp)
2516 child_valobj_sp = root->GetSyntheticArrayMember(index, true);
2517 if (!child_valobj_sp)
2518 if (root->HasSyntheticValue() &&
2519 llvm::expectedToStdOptional(
2520 root->GetSyntheticValue()->GetNumChildren())
2521 .value_or(0) > index)
2522 child_valobj_sp =
2523 root->GetSyntheticValue()->GetChildAtIndex(index);
2524 if (child_valobj_sp) {
2525 root = child_valobj_sp;
2526 remainder =
2527 temp_expression.substr(close_bracket_position + 1); // skip ]
2528 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypePlain;
2529 continue;
2530 } else {
2531 *reason_to_stop =
2532 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonNoSuchChild;
2533 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2534 return nullptr;
2535 }
2536 } else if (root_compiler_type_info.Test(eTypeIsPointer)) {
2537 if (*what_next ==
2538 ValueObject::
2539 eExpressionPathAftermathDereference && // if this is a
2540 // ptr-to-scalar, I
2541 // am accessing it
2542 // by index and I
2543 // would have
2544 // deref'ed anyway,
2545 // then do it now
2546 // and use this as
2547 // a bitfield
2548 pointee_compiler_type_info.Test(eTypeIsScalar)) {
2549 Status error;
2550 root = DereferenceValueOrAlternate(
2551 *root, options.m_synthetic_children_traversal, error);
2552 if (error.Fail() || !root) {
2553 *reason_to_stop =
2554 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonDereferencingFailed;
2555 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2556 return nullptr;
2557 } else {
2558 *what_next = eExpressionPathAftermathNothing;
2559 continue;
2560 }
2561 } else {
2562 if (root->GetCompilerType().GetMinimumLanguage() ==
2563 eLanguageTypeObjC &&
2564 pointee_compiler_type_info.AllClear(eTypeIsPointer) &&
2565 root->HasSyntheticValue() &&
2566 (options.m_synthetic_children_traversal ==
2567 GetValueForExpressionPathOptions::
2568 SyntheticChildrenTraversal::ToSynthetic ||
2569 options.m_synthetic_children_traversal ==
2570 GetValueForExpressionPathOptions::
2571 SyntheticChildrenTraversal::Both)) {
2572 root = root->GetSyntheticValue()->GetChildAtIndex(index);
2573 } else
2574 root = root->GetSyntheticArrayMember(index, true);
2575 if (!root) {
2576 *reason_to_stop =
2577 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonNoSuchChild;
2578 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2579 return nullptr;
2580 } else {
2581 remainder =
2582 temp_expression.substr(close_bracket_position + 1); // skip ]
2583 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypePlain;
2584 continue;
2585 }
2586 }
2587 } else if (root_compiler_type_info.Test(eTypeIsScalar)) {
2588 root = root->GetSyntheticBitFieldChild(index, index, true);
2589 if (!root) {
2590 *reason_to_stop =
2591 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonNoSuchChild;
2592 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2593 return nullptr;
2594 } else // we do not know how to expand members of bitfields, so we
2595 // just return and let the caller do any further processing
2596 {
2597 *reason_to_stop = ValueObject::
2598 eExpressionPathScanEndReasonBitfieldRangeOperatorMet;
2599 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeBitfield;
2600 return root;
2601 }
2602 } else if (root_compiler_type_info.Test(eTypeIsVector)) {
2603 root = root->GetChildAtIndex(index);
2604 if (!root) {
2605 *reason_to_stop =
2606 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonNoSuchChild;
2607 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2608 return ValueObjectSP();
2609 } else {
2610 remainder =
2611 temp_expression.substr(close_bracket_position + 1); // skip ]
2612 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypePlain;
2613 continue;
2614 }
2615 } else if (options.m_synthetic_children_traversal ==
2616 GetValueForExpressionPathOptions::
2617 SyntheticChildrenTraversal::ToSynthetic ||
2618 options.m_synthetic_children_traversal ==
2619 GetValueForExpressionPathOptions::
2620 SyntheticChildrenTraversal::Both) {
2621 if (root->HasSyntheticValue())
2622 root = root->GetSyntheticValue();
2623 else if (!root->IsSynthetic()) {
2624 *reason_to_stop =
2625 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonSyntheticValueMissing;
2626 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2627 return nullptr;
2628 }
2629 // if we are here, then root itself is a synthetic VO.. should be
2630 // good to go
2631
2632 if (!root) {
2633 *reason_to_stop =
2634 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonSyntheticValueMissing;
2635 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2636 return nullptr;
2637 }
2638 root = root->GetChildAtIndex(index);
2639 if (!root) {
2640 *reason_to_stop =
2641 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonNoSuchChild;
2642 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2643 return nullptr;
2644 } else {
2645 remainder =
2646 temp_expression.substr(close_bracket_position + 1); // skip ]
2647 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypePlain;
2648 continue;
2649 }
2650 } else {
2651 *reason_to_stop =
2652 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonNoSuchChild;
2653 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2654 return nullptr;
2655 }
2656 } else {
2657 // we have a low and a high index
2658 llvm::StringRef sleft, sright;
2659 unsigned long low_index, high_index;
2660 std::tie(sleft, sright) = bracket_expr.split('-');
2661 if (sleft.getAsInteger(0, low_index) ||
2662 sright.getAsInteger(0, high_index)) {
2663 *reason_to_stop =
2664 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonUnexpectedSymbol;
2665 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2666 return nullptr;
2667 }
2668
2669 if (low_index > high_index) // swap indices if required
2670 std::swap(low_index, high_index);
2671
2672 if (root_compiler_type_info.Test(
2673 eTypeIsScalar)) // expansion only works for scalars
2674 {
2675 root = root->GetSyntheticBitFieldChild(low_index, high_index, true);
2676 if (!root) {
2677 *reason_to_stop =
2678 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonNoSuchChild;
2679 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2680 return nullptr;
2681 } else {
2682 *reason_to_stop = ValueObject::
2683 eExpressionPathScanEndReasonBitfieldRangeOperatorMet;
2684 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeBitfield;
2685 return root;
2686 }
2687 } else if (root_compiler_type_info.Test(
2688 eTypeIsPointer) && // if this is a ptr-to-scalar, I am
2689 // accessing it by index and I would
2690 // have deref'ed anyway, then do it
2691 // now and use this as a bitfield
2692 *what_next ==
2693 ValueObject::eExpressionPathAftermathDereference &&
2694 pointee_compiler_type_info.Test(eTypeIsScalar)) {
2695 Status error;
2696 root = DereferenceValueOrAlternate(
2697 *root, options.m_synthetic_children_traversal, error);
2698 if (error.Fail() || !root) {
2699 *reason_to_stop =
2700 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonDereferencingFailed;
2701 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2702 return nullptr;
2703 } else {
2704 *what_next = ValueObject::eExpressionPathAftermathNothing;
2705 continue;
2706 }
2707 } else {
2708 *reason_to_stop =
2709 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonArrayRangeOperatorMet;
2710 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeBoundedRange;
2711 return root;
2712 }
2713 }
2714 break;
2715 }
2716 default: // some non-separator is in the way
2717 {
2718 *reason_to_stop =
2719 ValueObject::eExpressionPathScanEndReasonUnexpectedSymbol;
2720 *final_result = ValueObject::eExpressionPathEndResultTypeInvalid;
2721 return nullptr;
2722 }
2723 }
2724 }
2725}
2726
2727llvm::Error ValueObject::Dump(Stream &s) {
2728 return Dump(s, DumpValueObjectOptions(*this));
2729}
2730
2731llvm::Error ValueObject::Dump(Stream &s,
2732 const DumpValueObjectOptions &options) {
2733 ValueObjectPrinter printer(*this, &s, options);
2734 return printer.PrintValueObject();
2735}
2736
2737ValueObjectSP ValueObject::CreateConstantValue(ConstString name) {
2738 ValueObjectSP valobj_sp;
2739
2740 if (UpdateValueIfNeeded(false) && m_error.Success()) {
2741 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(GetExecutionContextRef());
2742
2743 DataExtractor data;
2744 data.SetByteOrder(m_data.GetByteOrder());
2745 data.SetAddressByteSize(m_data.GetAddressByteSize());
2746
2747 if (IsBitfield()) {
2748 Value v(Scalar(GetValueAsUnsigned(UINT64_MAX)));
2749 m_error = v.GetValueAsData(&exe_ctx, data, GetModule().get());
2750 } else
2751 m_error = m_value.GetValueAsData(&exe_ctx, data, GetModule().get());
2752
2753 valobj_sp = ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
2754 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(), GetCompilerType(), name, data,
2755 GetAddressOf().address);
2756 }
2757
2758 if (!valobj_sp) {
2759 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(GetExecutionContextRef());
2760 valobj_sp = ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
2761 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(), m_error.Clone());
2762 }
2763 return valobj_sp;
2764}
2765
2766ValueObjectSP ValueObject::GetQualifiedRepresentationIfAvailable(
2767 lldb::DynamicValueType dynValue, bool synthValue) {
2768 ValueObjectSP result_sp;
2769 switch (dynValue) {
2770 case lldb::eDynamicCanRunTarget:
2771 case lldb::eDynamicDontRunTarget: {
2772 if (!IsDynamic())
2773 result_sp = GetDynamicValue(dynValue);
2774 } break;
2775 case lldb::eNoDynamicValues: {
2776 if (IsDynamic())
2777 result_sp = GetStaticValue();
2778 } break;
2779 }
2780 if (!result_sp)
2781 result_sp = GetSP();
2782 assert(result_sp);
2783
2784 bool is_synthetic = result_sp->IsSynthetic();
2785 if (synthValue && !is_synthetic) {
2786 if (auto synth_sp = result_sp->GetSyntheticValue())
2787 return synth_sp;
2788 }
2789 if (!synthValue && is_synthetic) {
2790 if (auto non_synth_sp = result_sp->GetNonSyntheticValue())
2791 return non_synth_sp;
2792 }
2793
2794 return result_sp;
2795}
2796
2797ValueObjectSP ValueObject::Dereference(Status &error) {
2798 if (m_deref_valobj)
2799 return m_deref_valobj->GetSP();
2800
2801 std::string deref_name_str;
2802 uint32_t deref_byte_size = 0;
2803 int32_t deref_byte_offset = 0;
2804 CompilerType compiler_type = GetCompilerType();
2805 uint64_t language_flags = 0;
2806
2807 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(GetExecutionContextRef());
2808
2809 CompilerType deref_compiler_type;
2810 auto deref_compiler_type_or_err = compiler_type.GetDereferencedType(
2811 &exe_ctx, deref_name_str, deref_byte_size, deref_byte_offset, this,
2812 language_flags);
2813
2814 std::string deref_error;
2815 if (deref_compiler_type_or_err) {
2816 deref_compiler_type = *deref_compiler_type_or_err;
2817 } else {
2818 deref_error = llvm::toString(deref_compiler_type_or_err.takeError());
2819 LLDB_LOG(GetLog(LLDBLog::Types), "could not find child: {0}", deref_error);
2820 }
2821
2822 if (deref_compiler_type && deref_byte_size) {
2823 ConstString deref_name;
2824 if (!deref_name_str.empty())
2825 deref_name.SetCString(deref_name_str.c_str());
2826
2827 m_deref_valobj =
2828 new ValueObjectChild(*this, deref_compiler_type, deref_name,
2829 deref_byte_size, deref_byte_offset, 0, 0, false,
2830 true, eAddressTypeInvalid, language_flags);
2831 }
2832
2833 // In case of incomplete deref compiler type, use the pointee type and try
2834 // to recreate a new ValueObjectChild using it.
2835 if (!m_deref_valobj) {
2836 // FIXME(#59012): C++ stdlib formatters break with incomplete types (e.g.
2837 // `std::vector<int> &`). Remove ObjC restriction once that's resolved.
2838 if (Language::LanguageIsObjC(GetPreferredDisplayLanguage()) &&
2839 HasSyntheticValue()) {
2840 deref_compiler_type = compiler_type.GetPointeeType();
2841
2842 if (deref_compiler_type) {
2843 ConstString deref_name;
2844 if (!deref_name_str.empty())
2845 deref_name.SetCString(deref_name_str.c_str());
2846
2847 m_deref_valobj = new ValueObjectChild(
2848 *this, deref_compiler_type, deref_name, deref_byte_size,
2849 deref_byte_offset, 0, 0, false, true, eAddressTypeInvalid,
2850 language_flags);
2851 }
2852 }
2853 }
2854
2855 if (!m_deref_valobj && IsSynthetic())
2856 m_deref_valobj = GetChildMemberWithName("$$dereference$$").get();
2857
2858 if (m_deref_valobj) {
2859 error.Clear();
2860 return m_deref_valobj->GetSP();
2861 } else {
2862 StreamString strm;
2863 GetExpressionPath(strm);
2864
2865 if (deref_error.empty())
2866 error = Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat(
2867 "dereference failed: (%s) %s",
2868 GetTypeName().AsCString("<invalid type>"), strm.GetData());
2869 else
2870 error = Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat(
2871 "dereference failed: %s: (%s) %s", deref_error.c_str(),
2872 GetTypeName().AsCString("<invalid type>"), strm.GetData());
2873 return ValueObjectSP();
2874 }
2875}
2876
2877ValueObjectSP ValueObject::AddressOf(Status &error) {
2878 if (m_addr_of_valobj_sp)
2879 return m_addr_of_valobj_sp;
2880
2881 auto [addr, address_type] = GetAddressOf(/*scalar_is_load_address=*/false);
2882 error.Clear();
2883 if (addr != LLDB_INVALID_ADDRESS && address_type != eAddressTypeHost) {
2884 switch (address_type) {
2885 case eAddressTypeInvalid: {
2886 StreamString expr_path_strm;
2887 GetExpressionPath(expr_path_strm);
2888 error = Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat("'%s' is not in memory",
2889 expr_path_strm.GetData());
2890 } break;
2891
2892 case eAddressTypeFile:
2893 case eAddressTypeLoad: {
2894 CompilerType compiler_type = GetCompilerType();
2895 if (compiler_type) {
2896 std::string name(1, '&');
2897 name.append(m_name.AsCString(""));
2898 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(GetExecutionContextRef());
2899
2900 lldb::DataBufferSP buffer(
2901 new lldb_private::DataBufferHeap(&addr, sizeof(lldb::addr_t)));
2902 m_addr_of_valobj_sp = ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
2903 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
2904 compiler_type.GetPointerType(), ConstString(name.c_str()), buffer,
2905 endian::InlHostByteOrder(), exe_ctx.GetAddressByteSize());
2906 }
2907 } break;
2908 default:
2909 break;
2910 }
2911 } else {
2912 StreamString expr_path_strm;
2913 GetExpressionPath(expr_path_strm);
2914 error = Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat(
2915 "'%s' doesn't have a valid address", expr_path_strm.GetData());
2916 }
2917
2918 return m_addr_of_valobj_sp;
2919}
2920
2921ValueObjectSP ValueObject::DoCast(const CompilerType &compiler_type) {
2922 return ValueObjectCast::Create(*this, GetName(), compiler_type);
2923}
2924
2925ValueObjectSP ValueObject::Cast(const CompilerType &compiler_type) {
2926 // Only allow casts if the original type is equal or larger than the cast
2927 // type, unless we know this is a load address. Getting the size wrong for
2928 // a host side storage could leak lldb memory, so we absolutely want to
2929 // prevent that. We may not always get the right value, for instance if we
2930 // have an expression result value that's copied into a storage location in
2931 // the target may not have copied enough memory. I'm not trying to fix that
2932 // here, I'm just making Cast from a smaller to a larger possible in all the
2933 // cases where that doesn't risk making a Value out of random lldb memory.
2934 // You have to check the ValueObject's Value for the address types, since
2935 // ValueObjects that use live addresses will tell you they fetch data from the
2936 // live address, but once they are made, they actually don't.
2937 // FIXME: Can we make ValueObject's with a live address fetch "more data" from
2938 // the live address if it is still valid?
2939
2940 Status error;
2941 CompilerType my_type = GetCompilerType();
2942
2943 ExecutionContextScope *exe_scope =
2944 ExecutionContext(GetExecutionContextRef()).GetBestExecutionContextScope();
2945 if (llvm::expectedToOptional(compiler_type.GetByteSize(exe_scope))
2946 .value_or(0) <=
2947 llvm::expectedToOptional(GetCompilerType().GetByteSize(exe_scope))
2948 .value_or(0) ||
2949 m_value.GetValueType() == Value::ValueType::LoadAddress)
2950 return DoCast(compiler_type);
2951
2952 error = Status::FromErrorString(
2953 "Can only cast to a type that is equal to or smaller "
2954 "than the orignal type.");
2955
2956 return ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
2957 ExecutionContext(GetExecutionContextRef()).GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
2958 std::move(error));
2959}
2960
2961lldb::ValueObjectSP ValueObject::Clone(ConstString new_name) {
2962 return ValueObjectCast::Create(*this, new_name, GetCompilerType());
2963}
2964
2965ValueObjectSP ValueObject::CastPointerType(const char *name,
2966 CompilerType &compiler_type) {
2967 ValueObjectSP valobj_sp;
2968 addr_t ptr_value = GetPointerValue().address;
2969
2970 if (ptr_value != LLDB_INVALID_ADDRESS) {
2971 Address ptr_addr(ptr_value);
2972 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(GetExecutionContextRef());
2973 valobj_sp = ValueObjectMemory::Create(
2974 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(), name, ptr_addr, compiler_type);
2975 }
2976 return valobj_sp;
2977}
2978
2979ValueObjectSP ValueObject::CastPointerType(const char *name, TypeSP &type_sp) {
2980 ValueObjectSP valobj_sp;
2981 addr_t ptr_value = GetPointerValue().address;
2982
2983 if (ptr_value != LLDB_INVALID_ADDRESS) {
2984 Address ptr_addr(ptr_value);
2985 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(GetExecutionContextRef());
2986 valobj_sp = ValueObjectMemory::Create(
2987 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(), name, ptr_addr, type_sp);
2988 }
2989 return valobj_sp;
2990}
2991
2992lldb::addr_t ValueObject::GetLoadAddress() {
2993 if (auto target_sp = GetTargetSP()) {
2994 const bool scalar_is_load_address = true;
2995 auto [addr_value, addr_type] = GetAddressOf(scalar_is_load_address);
2996 if (addr_type == eAddressTypeFile) {
2997 lldb::ModuleSP module_sp(GetModule());
2998 if (!module_sp)
2999 addr_value = LLDB_INVALID_ADDRESS;
3000 else {
3001 Address tmp_addr;
3002 module_sp->ResolveFileAddress(addr_value, tmp_addr);
3003 addr_value = tmp_addr.GetLoadAddress(target_sp.get());
3004 }
3005 } else if (addr_type == eAddressTypeHost ||
3006 addr_type == eAddressTypeInvalid)
3007 addr_value = LLDB_INVALID_ADDRESS;
3008 return addr_value;
3009 }
3010 return LLDB_INVALID_ADDRESS;
3011}
3012
3013llvm::Expected<lldb::ValueObjectSP> ValueObject::CastDerivedToBaseType(
3014 CompilerType type, const llvm::ArrayRef<uint32_t> &base_type_indices) {
3015 // Make sure the starting type and the target type are both valid for this
3016 // type of cast; otherwise return the shared pointer to the original
3017 // (unchanged) ValueObject.
3018 if (!type.IsPointerType() && !type.IsReferenceType())
3019 return llvm::make_error<llvm::StringError>(
3020 "Invalid target type: should be a pointer or a reference",
3021 llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode());
3022
3023 CompilerType start_type = GetCompilerType();
3024 if (start_type.IsReferenceType())
3025 start_type = start_type.GetNonReferenceType();
3026
3027 auto target_record_type =
3028 type.IsPointerType() ? type.GetPointeeType() : type.GetNonReferenceType();
3029 auto start_record_type =
3030 start_type.IsPointerType() ? start_type.GetPointeeType() : start_type;
3031
3032 if (!target_record_type.IsRecordType() || !start_record_type.IsRecordType())
3033 return llvm::make_error<llvm::StringError>(
3034 "Underlying start & target types should be record types",
3035 llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode());
3036
3037 if (target_record_type.CompareTypes(start_record_type))
3038 return llvm::make_error<llvm::StringError>(
3039 "Underlying start & target types should be different",
3040 llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode());
3041
3042 if (base_type_indices.empty())
3043 return llvm::make_error<llvm::StringError>(
3044 "Children sequence must be non-empty", llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode());
3045
3046 // Both the starting & target types are valid for the cast, and the list of
3047 // base class indices is non-empty, so we can proceed with the cast.
3048
3049 lldb::TargetSP target = GetTargetSP();
3050 // The `value` can be a pointer, but GetChildAtIndex works for pointers too.
3051 lldb::ValueObjectSP inner_value = GetSP();
3052
3053 for (const uint32_t i : base_type_indices)
3054 // Create synthetic value if needed.
3055 inner_value =
3056 inner_value->GetChildAtIndex(i, /*can_create_synthetic*/ true);
3057
3058 // At this point type of `inner_value` should be the dereferenced target
3059 // type.
3060 CompilerType inner_value_type = inner_value->GetCompilerType();
3061 if (type.IsPointerType()) {
3062 if (!inner_value_type.CompareTypes(type.GetPointeeType()))
3063 return llvm::make_error<llvm::StringError>(
3064 "casted value doesn't match the desired type",
3065 llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode());
3066
3067 uintptr_t addr = inner_value->GetLoadAddress();
3068 llvm::StringRef name = "";
3069 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(target.get(), false);
3070 return ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromAddress(name, addr, exe_ctx, type,
3071 /* do deref */ false);
3072 }
3073
3074 // At this point the target type should be a reference.
3075 if (!inner_value_type.CompareTypes(type.GetNonReferenceType()))
3076 return llvm::make_error<llvm::StringError>(
3077 "casted value doesn't match the desired type",
3078 llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode());
3079
3080 return lldb::ValueObjectSP(inner_value->Cast(type.GetNonReferenceType()));
3081}
3082
3083llvm::Expected<lldb::ValueObjectSP>
3084ValueObject::CastBaseToDerivedType(CompilerType type, uint64_t offset) {
3085 // Make sure the starting type and the target type are both valid for this
3086 // type of cast; otherwise return the shared pointer to the original
3087 // (unchanged) ValueObject.
3088 if (!type.IsPointerType() && !type.IsReferenceType())
3089 return llvm::make_error<llvm::StringError>(
3090 "Invalid target type: should be a pointer or a reference",
3091 llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode());
3092
3093 CompilerType start_type = GetCompilerType();
3094 if (start_type.IsReferenceType())
3095 start_type = start_type.GetNonReferenceType();
3096
3097 auto target_record_type =
3098 type.IsPointerType() ? type.GetPointeeType() : type.GetNonReferenceType();
3099 auto start_record_type =
3100 start_type.IsPointerType() ? start_type.GetPointeeType() : start_type;
3101
3102 if (!target_record_type.IsRecordType() || !start_record_type.IsRecordType())
3103 return llvm::make_error<llvm::StringError>(
3104 "Underlying start & target types should be record types",
3105 llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode());
3106
3107 if (target_record_type.CompareTypes(start_record_type))
3108 return llvm::make_error<llvm::StringError>(
3109 "Underlying start & target types should be different",
3110 llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode());
3111
3112 CompilerType virtual_base;
3113 if (target_record_type.IsVirtualBase(start_record_type, &virtual_base)) {
3114 if (!virtual_base.IsValid())
3115 return llvm::make_error<llvm::StringError>(
3116 "virtual base should be valid", llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode());
3117 return llvm::make_error<llvm::StringError>(
3118 llvm::Twine("cannot cast " + start_type.TypeDescription() + " to " +
3119 type.TypeDescription() + " via virtual base " +
3120 virtual_base.TypeDescription()),
3121 llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode());
3122 }
3123
3124 // Both the starting & target types are valid for the cast, so we can
3125 // proceed with the cast.
3126
3127 lldb::TargetSP target = GetTargetSP();
3128 auto pointer_type =
3129 type.IsPointerType() ? type : type.GetNonReferenceType().GetPointerType();
3130
3131 uintptr_t addr =
3132 type.IsPointerType() ? GetValueAsUnsigned(0) : GetLoadAddress();
3133
3134 llvm::StringRef name = "";
3135 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(target.get(), false);
3136 lldb::ValueObjectSP value = ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromAddress(
3137 name, addr - offset, exe_ctx, pointer_type, /* do_deref */ false);
3138
3139 if (type.IsPointerType())
3140 return value;
3141
3142 // At this point the target type is a reference. Since `value` is a pointer,
3143 // it has to be dereferenced.
3144 Status error;
3145 return value->Dereference(error);
3146}
3147
3148lldb::ValueObjectSP ValueObject::CastToBasicType(CompilerType type) {
3149 bool is_scalar = GetCompilerType().IsScalarType();
3150 bool is_enum = GetCompilerType().IsEnumerationType();
3151 bool is_pointer =
3152 GetCompilerType().IsPointerType() || GetCompilerType().IsNullPtrType();
3153 bool is_float = HasFloatingRepresentation(GetCompilerType());
3154 bool is_integer = GetCompilerType().IsInteger();
3155 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(GetExecutionContextRef());
3156
3157 if (!type.IsScalarType())
3158 return ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
3159 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
3160 Status::FromErrorString("target type must be a scalar"));
3161
3162 if (!is_scalar && !is_enum && !is_pointer)
3163 return ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
3164 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
3165 Status::FromErrorString("argument must be a scalar, enum, or pointer"));
3166
3167 lldb::TargetSP target = GetTargetSP();
3168 uint64_t type_byte_size = 0;
3169 uint64_t val_byte_size = 0;
3170 if (auto temp = llvm::expectedToOptional(type.GetByteSize(target.get())))
3171 type_byte_size = temp.value();
3172 if (auto temp =
3173 llvm::expectedToOptional(GetCompilerType().GetByteSize(target.get())))
3174 val_byte_size = temp.value();
3175
3176 if (is_pointer) {
3177 if (!type.IsInteger() && !type.IsBoolean())
3178 return ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
3179 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
3180 Status::FromErrorString("target type must be an integer or boolean"));
3181 if (!type.IsBoolean() && type_byte_size < val_byte_size)
3182 return ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
3183 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
3184 Status::FromErrorString(
3185 "target type cannot be smaller than the pointer type"));
3186 }
3187
3188 if (type.IsBoolean()) {
3189 if (!is_scalar || is_integer)
3190 return ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromBool(
3191 target, GetValueAsUnsigned(0) != 0, "result");
3192 else if (is_scalar && is_float) {
3193 auto float_value_or_err = GetValueAsAPFloat();
3194 if (float_value_or_err)
3195 return ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromBool(
3196 target, !float_value_or_err->isZero(), "result");
3197 else
3198 return ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
3199 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
3200 Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat(
3201 "cannot get value as APFloat: %s",
3202 llvm::toString(float_value_or_err.takeError()).c_str()));
3203 }
3204 }
3205
3206 if (type.IsInteger()) {
3207 if (!is_scalar || is_integer) {
3208 auto int_value_or_err = GetValueAsAPSInt();
3209 if (int_value_or_err) {
3210 // Get the value as APSInt and extend or truncate it to the requested
3211 // size.
3212 llvm::APSInt ext =
3213 int_value_or_err->extOrTrunc(type_byte_size * CHAR_BIT);
3214 return ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromAPInt(target, ext, type,
3215 "result");
3216 } else
3217 return ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
3218 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
3219 Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat(
3220 "cannot get value as APSInt: %s",
3221 llvm::toString(int_value_or_err.takeError()).c_str()));
3222 } else if (is_scalar && is_float) {
3223 llvm::APSInt integer(type_byte_size * CHAR_BIT, !type.IsSigned());
3224 bool is_exact;
3225 auto float_value_or_err = GetValueAsAPFloat();
3226 if (float_value_or_err) {
3227 llvm::APFloatBase::opStatus status =
3228 float_value_or_err->convertToInteger(
3229 integer, llvm::APFloat::rmTowardZero, &is_exact);
3230
3231 // Casting floating point values that are out of bounds of the target
3232 // type is undefined behaviour.
3233 if (status & llvm::APFloatBase::opInvalidOp)
3234 return ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
3235 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
3236 Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat(
3237 "invalid type cast detected: %s",
3238 llvm::toString(float_value_or_err.takeError()).c_str()));
3239 return ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromAPInt(target, integer, type,
3240 "result");
3241 }
3242 }
3243 }
3244
3245 if (HasFloatingRepresentation(type)) {
3246 if (!is_scalar) {
3247 auto int_value_or_err = GetValueAsAPSInt();
3248 if (int_value_or_err) {
3249 llvm::APSInt ext =
3250 int_value_or_err->extOrTrunc(type_byte_size * CHAR_BIT);
3251 Scalar scalar_int(ext);
3252 llvm::APFloat f =
3253 scalar_int.CreateAPFloatFromAPSInt(type.GetBasicTypeEnumeration());
3254 return ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromAPFloat(target, f, type,
3255 "result");
3256 } else {
3257 return ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
3258 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
3259 Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat(
3260 "cannot get value as APSInt: %s",
3261 llvm::toString(int_value_or_err.takeError()).c_str()));
3262 }
3263 } else {
3264 if (is_integer) {
3265 auto int_value_or_err = GetValueAsAPSInt();
3266 if (int_value_or_err) {
3267 Scalar scalar_int(*int_value_or_err);
3268 llvm::APFloat f = scalar_int.CreateAPFloatFromAPSInt(
3269 type.GetBasicTypeEnumeration());
3270 return ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromAPFloat(target, f, type,
3271 "result");
3272 } else {
3273 return ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
3274 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
3275 Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat(
3276 "cannot get value as APSInt: %s",
3277 llvm::toString(int_value_or_err.takeError()).c_str()));
3278 }
3279 }
3280 if (is_float) {
3281 auto float_value_or_err = GetValueAsAPFloat();
3282 if (float_value_or_err) {
3283 Scalar scalar_float(*float_value_or_err);
3284 llvm::APFloat f = scalar_float.CreateAPFloatFromAPFloat(
3285 type.GetBasicTypeEnumeration());
3286 return ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromAPFloat(target, f, type,
3287 "result");
3288 } else {
3289 return ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
3290 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
3291 Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat(
3292 "cannot get value as APFloat: %s",
3293 llvm::toString(float_value_or_err.takeError()).c_str()));
3294 }
3295 }
3296 }
3297 }
3298
3299 return ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
3300 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
3301 Status::FromErrorString("Unable to perform requested cast"));
3302}
3303
3304lldb::ValueObjectSP ValueObject::CastToEnumType(CompilerType type) {
3305 bool is_enum = GetCompilerType().IsEnumerationType();
3306 bool is_integer = GetCompilerType().IsInteger();
3307 bool is_float = HasFloatingRepresentation(GetCompilerType());
3308 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(GetExecutionContextRef());
3309
3310 if (!is_enum && !is_integer && !is_float)
3311 return ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
3312 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
3313 Status::FromErrorString(
3314 "argument must be an integer, a float, or an enum"));
3315
3316 if (!type.IsEnumerationType())
3317 return ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
3318 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
3319 Status::FromErrorString("target type must be an enum"));
3320
3321 lldb::TargetSP target = GetTargetSP();
3322 uint64_t byte_size = 0;
3323 if (auto temp = llvm::expectedToOptional(type.GetByteSize(target.get())))
3324 byte_size = temp.value();
3325
3326 if (is_float) {
3327 llvm::APSInt integer(byte_size * CHAR_BIT, !type.IsSigned());
3328 bool is_exact;
3329 auto value_or_err = GetValueAsAPFloat();
3330 if (value_or_err) {
3331 llvm::APFloatBase::opStatus status = value_or_err->convertToInteger(
3332 integer, llvm::APFloat::rmTowardZero, &is_exact);
3333
3334 // Casting floating point values that are out of bounds of the target
3335 // type is undefined behaviour.
3336 if (status & llvm::APFloatBase::opInvalidOp)
3337 return ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
3338 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
3339 Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat(
3340 "invalid type cast detected: %s",
3341 llvm::toString(value_or_err.takeError()).c_str()));
3342 return ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromAPInt(target, integer, type,
3343 "result");
3344 } else
3345 return ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
3346 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
3347 Status::FromErrorString("cannot get value as APFloat"));
3348 } else {
3349 // Get the value as APSInt and extend or truncate it to the requested size.
3350 auto value_or_err = GetValueAsAPSInt();
3351 if (value_or_err) {
3352 llvm::APSInt ext = value_or_err->extOrTrunc(byte_size * CHAR_BIT);
3353 return ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromAPInt(target, ext, type,
3354 "result");
3355 } else
3356 return ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
3357 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
3358 Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat(
3359 "cannot get value as APSInt: %s",
3360 llvm::toString(value_or_err.takeError()).c_str()));
3361 }
3362 return ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
3363 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
3364 Status::FromErrorString("Cannot perform requested cast"));
3365}
3366
3367ValueObject::EvaluationPoint::EvaluationPoint() : m_mod_id(), m_exe_ctx_ref() {}
3368
3369ValueObject::EvaluationPoint::EvaluationPoint(ExecutionContextScope *exe_scope,
3370 bool use_selected)
3371 : m_mod_id(), m_exe_ctx_ref() {
3372 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(exe_scope);
3373 TargetSP target_sp(exe_ctx.GetTargetSP());
3374 if (target_sp) {
3375 m_exe_ctx_ref.SetTargetSP(target_sp);
3376 ProcessSP process_sp(exe_ctx.GetProcessSP());
3377 if (!process_sp)
3378 process_sp = target_sp->GetProcessSP();
3379
3380 if (process_sp) {
3381 m_mod_id = process_sp->GetModID();
3382 m_exe_ctx_ref.SetProcessSP(process_sp);
3383
3384 ThreadSP thread_sp(exe_ctx.GetThreadSP());
3385
3386 if (!thread_sp) {
3387 if (use_selected)
3388 thread_sp = process_sp->GetThreadList().GetSelectedThread();
3389 }
3390
3391 if (thread_sp) {
3392 m_exe_ctx_ref.SetThreadSP(thread_sp);
3393
3394 StackFrameSP frame_sp(exe_ctx.GetFrameSP());
3395 if (!frame_sp) {
3396 if (use_selected)
3397 frame_sp = thread_sp->GetSelectedFrame(DoNoSelectMostRelevantFrame);
3398 }
3399 if (frame_sp)
3400 m_exe_ctx_ref.SetFrameSP(frame_sp);
3401 }
3402 }
3403 }
3404}
3405
3406ValueObject::EvaluationPoint::EvaluationPoint(
3407 const ValueObject::EvaluationPoint &rhs)
3408 : m_mod_id(), m_exe_ctx_ref(rhs.m_exe_ctx_ref) {}
3409
3410ValueObject::EvaluationPoint::~EvaluationPoint() = default;
3411
3412// This function checks the EvaluationPoint against the current process state.
3413// If the current state matches the evaluation point, or the evaluation point
3414// is already invalid, then we return false, meaning "no change". If the
3415// current state is different, we update our state, and return true meaning
3416// "yes, change". If we did see a change, we also set m_needs_update to true,
3417// so future calls to NeedsUpdate will return true. exe_scope will be set to
3418// the current execution context scope.
3419
3420bool ValueObject::EvaluationPoint::SyncWithProcessState(
3421 bool accept_invalid_exe_ctx) {
3422 // Start with the target, if it is NULL, then we're obviously not going to
3423 // get any further:
3424 const bool thread_and_frame_only_if_stopped = true;
3425 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(
3426 m_exe_ctx_ref.Lock(thread_and_frame_only_if_stopped));
3427
3428 if (exe_ctx.GetTargetPtr() == nullptr)
3429 return false;
3430
3431 // If we don't have a process nothing can change.
3432 Process *process = exe_ctx.GetProcessPtr();
3433 if (process == nullptr)
3434 return false;
3435
3436 // If our stop id is the current stop ID, nothing has changed:
3437 ProcessModID current_mod_id = process->GetModID();
3438
3439 // If the current stop id is 0, either we haven't run yet, or the process
3440 // state has been cleared. In either case, we aren't going to be able to sync
3441 // with the process state.
3442 if (current_mod_id.GetStopID() == 0)
3443 return false;
3444
3445 bool changed = false;
3446 const bool was_valid = m_mod_id.IsValid();
3447 if (was_valid) {
3448 if (m_mod_id == current_mod_id) {
3449 // Everything is already up to date in this object, no need to update the
3450 // execution context scope.
3451 changed = false;
3452 } else {
3453 m_mod_id = current_mod_id;
3454 m_needs_update = true;
3455 changed = true;
3456 }
3457 }
3458
3459 // Now re-look up the thread and frame in case the underlying objects have
3460 // gone away & been recreated. That way we'll be sure to return a valid
3461 // exe_scope. If we used to have a thread or a frame but can't find it
3462 // anymore, then mark ourselves as invalid.
3463
3464 if (!accept_invalid_exe_ctx) {
3465 if (m_exe_ctx_ref.HasThreadRef()) {
3466 ThreadSP thread_sp(m_exe_ctx_ref.GetThreadSP());
3467 if (thread_sp) {
3468 if (m_exe_ctx_ref.HasFrameRef()) {
3469 StackFrameSP frame_sp(m_exe_ctx_ref.GetFrameSP());
3470 if (!frame_sp) {
3471 // We used to have a frame, but now it is gone
3472 SetInvalid();
3473 changed = was_valid;
3474 }
3475 }
3476 } else {
3477 // We used to have a thread, but now it is gone
3478 SetInvalid();
3479 changed = was_valid;
3480 }
3481 }
3482 }
3483
3484 return changed;
3485}
3486
3487void ValueObject::EvaluationPoint::SetUpdated() {
3488 ProcessSP process_sp(m_exe_ctx_ref.GetProcessSP());
3489 if (process_sp)
3490 m_mod_id = process_sp->GetModID();
3491 m_needs_update = false;
3492}
3493
3494void ValueObject::ClearUserVisibleData(uint32_t clear_mask) {
3495 if ((clear_mask & eClearUserVisibleDataItemsValue) ==
3496 eClearUserVisibleDataItemsValue)
3497 m_value_str.clear();
3498
3499 if ((clear_mask & eClearUserVisibleDataItemsLocation) ==
3500 eClearUserVisibleDataItemsLocation)
3501 m_location_str.clear();
3502
3503 if ((clear_mask & eClearUserVisibleDataItemsSummary) ==
3504 eClearUserVisibleDataItemsSummary)
3505 m_summary_str.clear();
3506
3507 if ((clear_mask & eClearUserVisibleDataItemsDescription) ==
3508 eClearUserVisibleDataItemsDescription)
3509 m_object_desc_str.clear();
3510
3511 if ((clear_mask & eClearUserVisibleDataItemsSyntheticChildren) ==
3512 eClearUserVisibleDataItemsSyntheticChildren) {
3513 if (m_synthetic_value)
3514 m_synthetic_value = nullptr;
3515 }
3516}
3517
3518SymbolContextScope *ValueObject::GetSymbolContextScope() {
3519 if (m_parent) {
3520 if (!m_parent->IsPointerOrReferenceType())
3521 return m_parent->GetSymbolContextScope();
3522 }
3523 return nullptr;
3524}
3525
3526lldb::ValueObjectSP
3527ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromExpression(llvm::StringRef name,
3528 llvm::StringRef expression,
3529 const ExecutionContext &exe_ctx) {
3530 return CreateValueObjectFromExpression(name, expression, exe_ctx,
3531 EvaluateExpressionOptions());
3532}
3533
3534lldb::ValueObjectSP ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromExpression(
3535 llvm::StringRef name, llvm::StringRef expression,
3536 const ExecutionContext &exe_ctx, const EvaluateExpressionOptions &options) {
3537 lldb::ValueObjectSP retval_sp;
3538 lldb::TargetSP target_sp(exe_ctx.GetTargetSP());
3539 if (!target_sp)
3540 return retval_sp;
3541 if (expression.empty())
3542 return retval_sp;
3543 target_sp->EvaluateExpression(expression, exe_ctx.GetFrameSP().get(),
3544 retval_sp, options);
3545 if (retval_sp && !name.empty())
3546 retval_sp->SetName(ConstString(name));
3547 return retval_sp;
3548}
3549
3550lldb::ValueObjectSP ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromAddress(
3551 llvm::StringRef name, uint64_t address, const ExecutionContext &exe_ctx,
3552 CompilerType type, bool do_deref) {
3553 if (type) {
3554 CompilerType pointer_type(type.GetPointerType());
3555 if (!do_deref)
3556 pointer_type = type;
3557 if (pointer_type) {
3558 lldb::DataBufferSP buffer(
3559 new lldb_private::DataBufferHeap(&address, sizeof(lldb::addr_t)));
3560 lldb::ValueObjectSP ptr_result_valobj_sp(ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
3561 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(), pointer_type,
3562 ConstString(name), buffer, exe_ctx.GetByteOrder(),
3563 exe_ctx.GetAddressByteSize()));
3564 if (ptr_result_valobj_sp) {
3565 if (do_deref)
3566 ptr_result_valobj_sp->GetValue().SetValueType(
3567 Value::ValueType::LoadAddress);
3568 Status err;
3569 if (do_deref)
3570 ptr_result_valobj_sp = ptr_result_valobj_sp->Dereference(err);
3571 if (ptr_result_valobj_sp && !name.empty())
3572 ptr_result_valobj_sp->SetName(ConstString(name));
3573 }
3574 return ptr_result_valobj_sp;
3575 }
3576 }
3577 return lldb::ValueObjectSP();
3578}
3579
3580lldb::ValueObjectSP ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromData(
3581 llvm::StringRef name, const DataExtractor &data,
3582 const ExecutionContext &exe_ctx, CompilerType type) {
3583 lldb::ValueObjectSP new_value_sp;
3584 new_value_sp = ValueObjectConstResult::Create(
3585 exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(), type, ConstString(name), data,
3586 LLDB_INVALID_ADDRESS);
3587 new_value_sp->SetAddressTypeOfChildren(eAddressTypeLoad);
3588 if (new_value_sp && !name.empty())
3589 new_value_sp->SetName(ConstString(name));
3590 return new_value_sp;
3591}
3592
3593lldb::ValueObjectSP
3594ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromAPInt(lldb::TargetSP target,
3595 const llvm::APInt &v, CompilerType type,
3596 llvm::StringRef name) {
3597 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(target.get(), false);
3598 uint64_t byte_size = 0;
3599 if (auto temp = llvm::expectedToOptional(type.GetByteSize(target.get())))
3600 byte_size = temp.value();
3601 lldb::DataExtractorSP data_sp = std::make_shared<DataExtractor>(
3602 reinterpret_cast<const void *>(v.getRawData()), byte_size,
3603 exe_ctx.GetByteOrder(), exe_ctx.GetAddressByteSize());
3604 return ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromData(name, *data_sp, exe_ctx, type);
3605}
3606
3607lldb::ValueObjectSP ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromAPFloat(
3608 lldb::TargetSP target, const llvm::APFloat &v, CompilerType type,
3609 llvm::StringRef name) {
3610 return CreateValueObjectFromAPInt(target, v.bitcastToAPInt(), type, name);
3611}
3612
3613lldb::ValueObjectSP ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromScalar(
3614 lldb::TargetSP target, Scalar &s, CompilerType type, llvm::StringRef name) {
3615 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(target.get(), false);
3616 return ValueObjectConstResult::Create(exe_ctx.GetBestExecutionContextScope(),
3617 type, s, ConstString(name));
3618}
3619
3620lldb::ValueObjectSP
3621ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromBool(lldb::TargetSP target, bool value,
3622 llvm::StringRef name) {
3623 CompilerType target_type;
3624 if (target) {
3625 for (auto type_system_sp : target->GetScratchTypeSystems())
3626 if (auto compiler_type =
3627 type_system_sp->GetBasicTypeFromAST(lldb::eBasicTypeBool)) {
3628 target_type = compiler_type;
3629 break;
3630 }
3631 }
3632 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(target.get(), false);
3633 uint64_t byte_size = 0;
3634 if (auto temp =
3635 llvm::expectedToOptional(target_type.GetByteSize(target.get())))
3636 byte_size = temp.value();
3637 lldb::DataExtractorSP data_sp = std::make_shared<DataExtractor>(
3638 reinterpret_cast<const void *>(&value), byte_size, exe_ctx.GetByteOrder(),
3639 exe_ctx.GetAddressByteSize());
3640 return ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromData(name, *data_sp, exe_ctx,
3641 target_type);
3642}
3643
3644lldb::ValueObjectSP ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromNullptr(
3645 lldb::TargetSP target, CompilerType type, llvm::StringRef name) {
3646 if (!type.IsNullPtrType()) {
3647 lldb::ValueObjectSP ret_val;
3648 return ret_val;
3649 }
3650 uintptr_t zero = 0;
3651 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(target.get(), false);
3652 uint64_t byte_size = 0;
3653 if (auto temp = llvm::expectedToOptional(type.GetByteSize(target.get())))
3654 byte_size = temp.value();
3655 lldb::DataExtractorSP data_sp = std::make_shared<DataExtractor>(
3656 reinterpret_cast<const void *>(zero), byte_size, exe_ctx.GetByteOrder(),
3657 exe_ctx.GetAddressByteSize());
3658 return ValueObject::CreateValueObjectFromData(name, *data_sp, exe_ctx, type);
3659}
3660
3661ModuleSP ValueObject::GetModule() {
3662 ValueObject *root(GetRoot());
3663 if (root != this)
3664 return root->GetModule();
3665 return lldb::ModuleSP();
3666}
3667
3668ValueObject *ValueObject::GetRoot() {
3669 if (m_root)
3670 return m_root;
3671 return (m_root = FollowParentChain([](ValueObject *vo) -> bool {
3672 return (vo->m_parent != nullptr);
3673 }));
3674}
3675
3676ValueObject *
3677ValueObject::FollowParentChain(std::function<bool(ValueObject *)> f) {
3678 ValueObject *vo = this;
3679 while (vo) {
3680 if (!f(vo))
3681 break;
3682 vo = vo->m_parent;
3683 }
3684 return vo;
3685}
3686
3687AddressType ValueObject::GetAddressTypeOfChildren() {
3688 if (m_address_type_of_ptr_or_ref_children == eAddressTypeInvalid) {
3689 ValueObject *root(GetRoot());
3690 if (root != this)
3691 return root->GetAddressTypeOfChildren();
3692 }
3693 return m_address_type_of_ptr_or_ref_children;
3694}
3695
3696lldb::DynamicValueType ValueObject::GetDynamicValueType() {
3697 ValueObject *with_dv_info = this;
3698 while (with_dv_info) {
3699 if (with_dv_info->HasDynamicValueTypeInfo())
3700 return with_dv_info->GetDynamicValueTypeImpl();
3701 with_dv_info = with_dv_info->m_parent;
3702 }
3703 return lldb::eNoDynamicValues;
3704}
3705
3706lldb::Format ValueObject::GetFormat() const {
3707 const ValueObject *with_fmt_info = this;
3708 while (with_fmt_info) {
3709 if (with_fmt_info->m_format != lldb::eFormatDefault)
3710 return with_fmt_info->m_format;
3711 with_fmt_info = with_fmt_info->m_parent;
3712 }
3713 return m_format;
3714}
3715
3716lldb::LanguageType ValueObject::GetPreferredDisplayLanguage() {
3717 lldb::LanguageType type = m_preferred_display_language;
3718 if (m_preferred_display_language == lldb::eLanguageTypeUnknown) {
3719 if (GetRoot()) {
3720 if (GetRoot() == this) {
3721 if (StackFrameSP frame_sp = GetFrameSP()) {
3722 const SymbolContext &sc(
3723 frame_sp->GetSymbolContext(eSymbolContextCompUnit));
3724 if (CompileUnit *cu = sc.comp_unit)
3725 type = cu->GetLanguage();
3726 }
3727 } else {
3728 type = GetRoot()->GetPreferredDisplayLanguage();
3729 }
3730 }
3731 }
3732 return (m_preferred_display_language = type); // only compute it once
3733}
3734
3735void ValueObject::SetPreferredDisplayLanguageIfNeeded(lldb::LanguageType lt) {
3736 if (m_preferred_display_language == lldb::eLanguageTypeUnknown)
3737 SetPreferredDisplayLanguage(lt);
3738}
3739
3740bool ValueObject::CanProvideValue() {
3741 // we need to support invalid types as providers of values because some bare-
3742 // board debugging scenarios have no notion of types, but still manage to
3743 // have raw numeric values for things like registers. sigh.
3744 CompilerType type = GetCompilerType();
3745 return (!type.IsValid()) || (0 != (type.GetTypeInfo() & eTypeHasValue));
3746}
3747
3748ValueObjectSP ValueObject::Persist() {
3749 if (!UpdateValueIfNeeded())
3750 return nullptr;
3751
3752 TargetSP target_sp(GetTargetSP());
3753 if (!target_sp)
3754 return nullptr;
3755
3756 PersistentExpressionState *persistent_state =
3757 target_sp->GetPersistentExpressionStateForLanguage(
3758 GetPreferredDisplayLanguage());
3759
3760 if (!persistent_state)
3761 return nullptr;
3762
3763 ConstString name = persistent_state->GetNextPersistentVariableName();
3764
3765 ValueObjectSP const_result_sp =
3766 ValueObjectConstResult::Create(target_sp.get(), GetValue(), name);
3767
3768 ExpressionVariableSP persistent_var_sp =
3769 persistent_state->CreatePersistentVariable(const_result_sp);
3770 persistent_var_sp->m_live_sp = persistent_var_sp->m_frozen_sp;
3771 persistent_var_sp->m_flags |= ExpressionVariable::EVIsProgramReference;
3772
3773 return persistent_var_sp->GetValueObject();
3774}
3775
3776lldb::ValueObjectSP ValueObject::GetVTable() {
3777 return ValueObjectVTable::Create(*this);
3778}
3779
3780ValueImpl::ValueImpl(lldb::ValueObjectSP in_valobj_sp,
3781 lldb::DynamicValueType use_dynamic, bool use_synthetic,
3782 const char *name)
3783 : m_use_dynamic(use_dynamic), m_use_synthetic(use_synthetic), m_name(name) {
3784 if (in_valobj_sp) {
3785 if ((m_valobj_sp = in_valobj_sp->GetQualifiedRepresentationIfAvailable(
3786 lldb::eNoDynamicValues, false))) {
3787 if (!m_name.IsEmpty())
3788 m_valobj_sp->SetName(m_name);
3789 }
3790 }
3791}
3792
3793ValueImpl &ValueImpl::operator=(const ValueImpl &rhs) {
3794 if (this != &rhs) {
3795 m_valobj_sp = rhs.m_valobj_sp;
3796 m_use_dynamic = rhs.m_use_dynamic;
3797 m_use_synthetic = rhs.m_use_synthetic;
3798 m_name = rhs.m_name;
3799 }
3800 return *this;
3801}
3802
3803bool ValueImpl::IsValid() {
3804 if (m_valobj_sp.get() == nullptr)
3805 return false;
3806
3807 // FIXME: This check is necessary but not sufficient. We for sure don't
3808 // want to touch SBValues whose owning
3809 // targets have gone away. This check is a little weak in that it
3810 // enforces that restriction when you call IsValid, but since IsValid
3811 // doesn't lock the target, you have no guarantee that the SBValue won't
3812 // go invalid after you call this... Also, an SBValue could depend on
3813 // data from one of the modules in the target, and those could go away
3814 // independently of the target, for instance if a module is unloaded.
3815 // But right now, neither SBValues nor ValueObjects know which modules
3816 // they depend on. So I have no good way to make that check without
3817 // tracking that in all the ValueObject subclasses.
3818 TargetSP target_sp = m_valobj_sp->GetTargetSP();
3819 return target_sp && target_sp->IsValid();
3820}
3821
3822lldb::ValueObjectSP
3823ValueImpl::GetSP(Process::StopLocker &stop_locker,
3824 std::unique_lock<std::recursive_mutex> &lock, Status &error) {
3825 if (!m_valobj_sp) {
3826 error = Status::FromErrorString("invalid value object");
3827 return m_valobj_sp;
3828 }
3829
3830 lldb::ValueObjectSP value_sp = m_valobj_sp;
3831
3832 Target *target = value_sp->GetTargetSP().get();
3833 // If this ValueObject holds an error, then it is valuable for that.
3834 if (value_sp->GetError().Fail())
3835 return value_sp;
3836
3837 if (!target)
3838 return ValueObjectSP();
3839
3840 lock = std::unique_lock<std::recursive_mutex>(target->GetAPIMutex());
3841
3842 ProcessSP process_sp(value_sp->GetProcessSP());
3843 if (process_sp && !stop_locker.TryLock(&process_sp->GetRunLock())) {
3844 // We don't allow people to play around with ValueObject if the process
3845 // is running. If you want to look at values, pause the process, then
3846 // look.
3847 error = Status::FromErrorString("process must be stopped.");
3848 return ValueObjectSP();
3849 }
3850
3851 if (m_use_dynamic != eNoDynamicValues) {
3852 ValueObjectSP dynamic_sp = value_sp->GetDynamicValue(m_use_dynamic);
3853 if (dynamic_sp)
3854 value_sp = dynamic_sp;
3855 }
3856
3857 if (m_use_synthetic) {
3858 ValueObjectSP synthetic_sp = value_sp->GetSyntheticValue();
3859 if (synthetic_sp)
3860 value_sp = synthetic_sp;
3861 }
3862
3863 if (!value_sp)
3864 error = Status::FromErrorString("invalid value object");
3865 if (!m_name.IsEmpty())
3866 value_sp->SetName(m_name);
3867
3868 return value_sp;
3869}

error
static llvm::raw_ostream & error(Stream &strm)
